'''竏嗚-ng-r-p''' ('''kajangrepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnetise|magnetise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnetise|magnetise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-ng-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| kajangrepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijangrepoko|thijangrepoko]] || [[word:jijangrepoko|jijangrepoko]] || [[word:shijangrepoko|shijangrepoko]] || [[word:kijangrepoko|kijangrepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujangrepoko|thuthujangrepoko]] || [[word:jujujangrepoko|jujujangrepoko]] || [[word:shushujangrepoko|shushujangrepoko]] || [[word:kukujangrepoko|kukujangrepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojangrepoko|thojangrepoko]] || [[word:jojangrepoko|jojangrepoko]] || [[word:shojangrepoko|shojangrepoko]] || [[word:kojangrepoko|kojangrepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjangrepoko|thﾃｦjangrepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦjangrepoko|jﾃｦjangrepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦjangrepoko|shﾃｦjangrepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦjangrepoko|kﾃｦjangrepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajangrepoko|thajangrepoko]] || [[word:jajangrepoko|jajangrepoko]] || [[word:shajangrepoko|shajangrepoko]] || [[word:kajangrepoko|kajangrepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
